function.name: about_sunculture
function.description: Returns information about SunCulture the company. Use this for questions about what SunCulture does, its mission, impact, countries of operation, contact details, payment options (M-Pesa paybill numbers, bank accounts), SunCulture Protect insurance, Kilimo Boost input financing, branch locations, warranty and free services, and account management (USSD, locking/unlocking behaviour).

category.description: The specific topic to retrieve information about.
